# Box MCP Server for Claude

Access enterprise content, analyze unstructured data, and automate workflows

## Trust
- Source: source-backed
- Package: maintainer-built/verified package
- Review: unclaimed

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status box
```

## Config
```json
{
  "box": {
    "url": "https://mcp.box.com/",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status box
